---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest new functionality for NXS+ or the Observatory extensions
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary
A clear and concise description of what you want added.

## Problem or Motivation
What problem does this solve? What research or teaching need does it address?

## Proposed Solution
Describe your preferred approach if you have one.

## Roadmap Alignment
Does this relate to a planned Observatory extension? (See `docs/ROADMAP.md`)
- [ ] Multi-vault loading (Y1)
- [ ] Embedding-based resonance (Y1)
- [ ] Agent society (Y2)
- [ ] Collision engine (Y2)
- [ ] n* spawning / provenance (Y2)
- [ ] Evaluation dashboard (Y3)
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've considered.

## Research Context
If this is motivated by a specific research or teaching use case, describe it briefly.

## Additional Context
Screenshots, mockups, references, or related issues.
